section_name: Certain United States License Required; Offense
text:
(a) A person may not act as a state-commissioned pilot of a vessel in any water in this state unless the person is licensed under Title 46, United States Code.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class A misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 61. Compulsory Pilotage
##### § 61.011 — Certain United States License Required; Offense

(a) A person may not act as a state-commissioned pilot of a vessel in any water in this state unless the person is licensed under Title 46, United States Code.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class A misdemeanor.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class A misdemeanor.
